notes: All 8 sites returned HTTP 403 with 21-byte bodies from both WebFetch and curl. SSL handshakes succeeded on all domains confirming servers are reachable. Pattern (all sites, identical response size) indicates Vercel/CDN edge network is blocking the automated checker's IP via bot protection, not actual downtime. SSL certificates valid through May 28 2026 (30 days remaining — at boundary, not flagged).
